name: Filled Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and scrub new potatoes; if they are older, peel them.
2. With a knife or a special tool, cut a whole in each potato. Boil them in salted water until they are done, but not too soft. Test them constantly.
3. Clean and chop mushrooms and carrots, and sauté in olive oil until they are done. Season with salt and pepper and a little lemon juice.
4. Cut bacon into very small pieces and add to it.
5. Wash spinach and cut into fine strips and add to the skillet.
6. Add the wine and heat through. Fill the potatoes with this mixture.
7. Sprinkle cheese over each potato and bake in the oven under the grill for a couple of minutes.
8. Serve with a green salad and a cold beer.
